title: Diemant's Grisha Villagers
description:
Are you a fan of Grishaverse? Would you like to add more magic to your villagers?
Based off of the famous series of books "Grishaverse", this pack makes every villager a grisha mage!
body:
**This pack changes villager outfits into grisha mage ones from "Grishaverse"**

![Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bcbade0e1249143f1f1ea706e1faf1eb04de9bc.png)

**In the book series "Grishaverse", there are people with magical powers called "grisha". They are divided into 3 orders, and have different types of mages in these orders. Every grisha wears a kefta, which is kind of like a mage robe. The main color represents an order, and the color of the ornament represents the type of grisha.**

### The villagers are divided as follows:

**Corporalki Order (Red kefta):**

- Heartrenders (black ornament) - Grishas capable of bloodbending: Butchers & Leatherworkers
- Healers (gray ornament) - Grishas capable of healing: Librarians
-   Taylors (blue ornament) - Grishas capable of changing one's appearance: Shepherds

**Etherialki Order (Blue kefta):**

-  Tidemakers (light blue ornament) - Grishas capable of waterbending: Farmers & Fishermen
-  Inferni (red/fiery ornament) - Grishas capable of firebending: Toolsmiths & Weaponsmiths
-  Squarells (silver ornament) - Grishas capable of airbending: Fletchers
-  Sun Summoner (golden ornament) - Grishas capable of lightbending: Cartographers (yes, this is a reference)

**Materialki Order (Purple kefta):**
 
-  Durasts (gray ornament) - Grishas capable of metalbending: Masons & Armorers
-  Alkemi (red ornament) - Grishas capable of manipulating poisons and chemicals: Clerics

**Other Details:**
-  Villagers with no professions have a royal servant clothing (white robe)
-  Nitwits have an oprichnik clothing (gray robe)
-  The level of the villager is represented by his belt
-  There are no variants between biomes

If you encounter any issues with this pack, please submit them using GitHub.

Слава Равке! Слава Королю Шрамов!
